Loved by travellers

What Our Travellers Say

Booked the Kerala Backwaters trip for my parents' anniversary. They absolutely loved the houseboat experience and the tea plantations in Munnar. Great value for money and the booking process was super smooth.

AG

Anita Gurung

Pokhara, Nepal

The Everest Base Camp trek was the adventure of a lifetime. Standing at the base of the world's highest mountain is something I'll treasure forever. The Vraman team's attention to acclimatisation made all the difference.

MC

Michael Chen

Singapore

Great experience with the Chitwan safari. Saw rhinos up close on the jeep safari and the Tharu dance was a lovely evening. The only minor issue was the long bus ride from Kathmandu, but the lodge more than made up for it.

PT

Priya Thapa

Kathmandu, Nepal

We chose Vraman for our honeymoon in Thailand. Bangkok was electric and Phuket was paradise. The team even arranged a surprise candlelit dinner on the beach. Beyond our expectations!

E&

Emma & Tom Wilson

Sydney, Australia

Booked the Golden Triangle tour for my family. The driver was punctual, the hotels were excellent, and our guide brought the history to life. The sunrise at the Taj Mahal was a moment I'll never forget. Highly recommend!

RS

Rajesh Sharma

Delhi, India

Our Annapurna Base Camp trek was absolutely life-changing! The guide was incredibly knowledgeable and the tea-house accommodation was much better than expected. Vraman Holidays planned every detail perfectly — we didn't have to worry about a thing.

SJ

Sarah Johnson

London, UK

Newsletter

Get travel deals and inspiration in your inbox.

Vraman Holidays™ is a Nepal-based destination management company dedicated to helping travellers experience Nepal and the world in meaningful ways. We do not simply arrange trips – we create stories worth living, memories worth sharing, and experiences worth remembering. Every itinerary, every adventure, and every journey is designed with one purpose: to help our guests confidently Propose Your Destination™ while we take care of the rest.
